name: Interview Invitation
html:
Interview Invitation

Dear {{ frappe.db.get_value('Internship Application', doc.application, 'applicant_name') or doc.application }},

You are invited for an interview with the Kenya Red Cross Society.

Vacancy{{ doc.vacancy }}
Date{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.interview_date) }}
Time{{ doc.interview_time }}
Venue{{ doc.venue or '' }}
Meeting Link{{ doc.meeting_link or '' }}
Panel{% set panels = [] %}{% for row in doc.interview_panel %}{% set _ = panels.append(row.panel_member) %}{% endfor %}{{ panels | join(', ') }}

For questions, please contact HR.
